arts.ttl: Man Utd sign Denmark defender Patrick Dorgu from Lecce for initial £25million
arts.sum: The 20-year-old wing-back has signed a deal until June 2030.

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Manchester United Sign Patrick Dorgu from Lecce
arts.sum: Manchester United have officially announced the signing of Patrick Dorgu from Lecce, marking a significant addition to their defensive lineup. The 20-year-old Danish international has committed to a long-term contract with the Red Devils, extending until June 2030 with an option for an additional year. The post OFFICIAL: Manchester United Sign Patrick Dorgu from Lecce appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Patrick Dorgu: Man Utd 'perfect place' as £29.2m signing confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester United complete the signing of Patrick Dorgu from Lecce on a five-year contract.

arts.sum: Manchester United have officially announced the signing of Denmark international Patrick Dorgu on a permanent...

arts.ttl: Manchester United seal €30m signing of Lecce wing-back Patrick Dorgu
arts.sum: Denmark international signs deal until June 2020 Dorgu ‘cannot wait to work with Ruben Amorim’ Manchester United have completed the signing of Patrick Dorgu from Lecce, subject to visa and registration. The Denmark international has signed a contract until June 2030, with the option of an additional year. Dorgu, who can play as a left-back, right-back or further forward on the flanks, has played 57 games for Lecce, contributing five goals. United have paid an initial €30m fee (£25.1m) with up to €5m (£4.2m) payable in bonuses. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News: Red Devils officially complete Patrick Dorgu signing
arts.sum: Man Utd have announced that they have signed Lecce star Patrick Dorgu, with the deal thought to be worth €30 million plus €5m in bonuses. OFFICIAL: Man Utd complete Patrick Dorgu transfer

arts.ttl: Patrick Dorgu: Manchester United confirm first new major signing of Ruben Amorim era
